beefs.title: After Hours til Dawn Tour
quotes: This is the ONLY source providing this information — and this is the information we should be sticking to — anything outside of this is original research, which is not allowed on Wikipedia.

As with every time before, zero source provided for this information. The only sourced information covers Prince 85 for the shows they are listed for. Provide a reliable, third-party source (properly cited) or refrain from persistently adding the information into the article. And removing a period to simply make a personal attack is uncalled for.
